INSURANCE CLAIM FORM

Claimant name: Ava Thompson
Policy number: POL-AUTO-001
Category: auto
Date of incident: 2026-06-20
Amount claimed: $1200.00

Description:
I was rear-ended at a stop light and my rear bumper needs replacement.

To whom it may concern,

My name is Ava Thompson and I hold policy POL-AUTO-001 (auto insurance). I am filing
a claim for $2450.00 for an incident that happened on 2026-06-11.

Another driver ran into the back of my car at a red light; the trunk lid and rear bumper are crushed.

Regards,
Ava Thompson

Ava Thompson
